title: jansenella neglecta
intro: Jansenella neglecta is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Jansenella neglecta plant. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, with potential benefits including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Jansenella neglecta may include the treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Jansenella neglecta can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in capsule or tincture form.
